title: Principal Instructional Designer at BSC Academy

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at BSC Academy
jsonLd.description:
BSC Academy invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BSC Academy:
BSC Academy is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy!
